command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
JOB_ID='phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2'

echo '=CANONICAL JOB CURRENT STATE='
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/

echo '=ALL RUNS='
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/ 2>/dev/null
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/ | grep -v _background

echo '=MOST RECENT RUN STATE='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/run-state.json 2>/dev/null

echo '=RUN ERROR='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/phase-error.json 2>/dev/null

echo '=WORKER LOG TAIL='
tail -20 memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/worker.log 2>/dev/null

echo '=PAC JOB STATUS='
cat memory/phase-controller/jobs/$JOB_ID/status.json 2>/dev/null

echo '=CONTROLLER STATE='
cat memory/phase-controller/controller.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({k:d[k] for k in ['status','current_job_id','enabled'] if k in d}, indent=2))"
ENDSSH
